rule.statement: Every stakeholder MUST have unique ID matching `^S-\d{3,}$`. IDs are stable across review cycles.
rule.rationale: Stable IDs enable engagement-diff and audit-trail.

rule.statement: Attitude MUST be one of {champion, supporter, neutral, critic, blocker}; free-text rejected.
Every entry MUST cite an evidence source (interview notes, sign-off, decision log).
Strategy text MUST be at least 24 chars; templated placeholders rejected.
Rows with last_reviewed older than 30 days MUST be flagged stale; staleness blocks register publication.
rule.rationale: Stale stakeholder data leads programme decisions on phantom context.
